title: EEG -> AKD1000 direct path 5x latency falsifier
claim_under_test: ADM-encoded EEG -> akida.Model.forward yields >=5x median end-to-end latency reduction vs float32 EEG -> Conv2D-ANN on RPi5 CPU

proposed_path.preprocessing: same bandpass + zscore, then ADM (theta=0.5sigma, refractory=4ms)
proposed_path.model: cnn2snn-converted equivalent of baseline ANN, mapped onto AKD1000
proposed_path.host: AKD1000 via M.2 PCIe gen2 single-lane on RPi5
proposed_path.metric: wall-clock t_akida per window (ms), measured around model.forward call

pass_criteria.secondary_accuracy: task accuracy (e.g. eyes-open/eyes-closed alpha discrimination) drop <= 5pp vs baseline
pass_criteria.energy_aux: AKD1000 wall-power <= 1.5 W typical (NDIR / USB power meter)

fail_modes: PCIe single-lane saturates and dominates latency (mitigation: batch multiple windows, or measure forward-only excluding transfer)
ARM64 akida wheel missing -> baseline cannot be measured on same host (mitigation: encoder on RPi5, model.forward on x86 dev host with USB-attached AKD1000)
cnn2snn fails to convert ANN -> drop to mapped akida.Model directly built via akida.Model() API
task accuracy drops > 5pp -> tier_1 claim downgraded to latency-only, separate cross-substrate Phi falsifier (T1-A2/F-A2) decides V_phen preservation
honest_c3_note: Hardware not yet in hand. Encoder dryrun (--selftest) is preflight only; chip-side measurement gated on Akida dev kit physical arrival.
